notes: Downloads now run in parallel: a new Settings → Downloads option, "Simultaneous downloads" (1–4, default 3), lets several tracks fetch at once instead of one at a time — a big queue of 400+ tracks clears much faster. Everything else about downloads behaves the same: the storage cap, retry-on-rate-limit, and blocked-track rules all still apply, just shared across the parallel downloads instead of a single one. Turn it down to 1 if you'd rather stay conservative with YouTube's rate limits.
